---
title: "Surgical instrumentation & implants"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Part of the **orthopedic** group &middot; 3,050 items
:::

Surgical instrumentation & implants. These are the tools and devices that doctors use in the operating theatre to repair, replace or support body parts. There are about three thousand different items in this collection.

## Sample Products

| Product |
|---------|
| FENTEX - Rubber Bulb                             for 832600FX |
| SonaStar - SonaStar FS 1000 RF Ultrasonic Surgical Aspiration System (Compatible for 110/22 |
| Nucleus - FREEDOM COIL, BROWN (6CM / 2") |
| LIFEPAK® 12 defibrillator/monitor - LP12AABCABAACBBBAABAAAAALP12 MONITOR-DEFIB |
| micromed - fixed and/or ambulatory long-term EEG recorder, 32 EEG channels |

## Related Categories

**Most similar:**

- [General Surgical Supplies](general-surgical-supplies.qmd)
- [Razek Surgical Instruments](razek-surgical-instruments.qmd)
- [Cannulated surgical instruments](cannulated-surgical-instruments.qmd)

**In the orthopedic group:**

- [Razek Surgical Instruments](razek-surgical-instruments.qmd) (3,417 items)
- [Bone Drills & Screws](bone-drills-screws.qmd) (3,259 items)
- [Orthopedic Surgical Accessories](orthopedic-surgical-accessories.qmd) (2,996 items)
- [Surgical instruments & consumables](surgical-instruments-consumables.qmd) (2,948 items)
- [General Surgical Supplies](general-surgical-supplies.qmd) (2,931 items)
- [Spine Surgical Instruments](spine-surgical-instruments.qmd) (2,557 items)
- [Cannulated surgical instruments](cannulated-surgical-instruments.qmd) (2,111 items)

<button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" onclick="askChat('Surgical instrumentation & implants')">
  Ask about this category
</button>
